FAIL src/math.test.js
  math
    ✕ adds numbers (6 ms)
    ✕ subtracts numbers (1 ms)

  ● math › adds numbers

    expect(received).toBe(expected) // Object.is equality

    Expected: 3
    Received: 4

      5 | test('adds numbers', () => {
      6 |   expect(add(2, 2)).toBe(3);
    > 7 | });
        |                    ^
      at Object.toBe (src/math.test.js:7:20)

  ● math › subtracts numbers

    expect(received).toEqual(expected)

    Expected: 1
    Received: 0

      10 | test('subtracts numbers', () => {
      11 |   expect(subtract(1, 1)).toEqual(1);
    > 12 | });
         |                           ^
      at Object.toEqual (src/math.test.js:12:27)
